mapper.select: SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, c.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, c.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, m.NICKNAME AS nickname, c.CONTENT AS content, c.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(c.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS c JOIN BL_MEMBERS m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND c.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = c.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ORDER BY c.COMMENT_ID DESC
SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, CONTENT AS content, STATUS AS status FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}

SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, c.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, c.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, m.NICKNAME AS nickname, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, c.CONTENT AS content, c.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(c.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, TO_CHAR(c.DELETED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS deletedAt, c.DELETED_BY AS deletedBy, c.DELETE_REASON AS deleteReason FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS c JOIN BL_MEMBERS m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON c.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE c.MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ORDER BY c.COMMENT_ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCTS p WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS (COMMENT_ID, PRODUCT_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT, STATUS, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, DELETED_AT = NULL, DELETED_BY = NULL, DELETE_REASON = NULL WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
